change_summary: Produced an observed-only shadow audit for fresh negative clean-news context on existing A/B candidates; no strategy behavior changed.
hypothesis: Fresh negative clean-news context may identify lower-quality existing A/B candidates for future event-aware ranking without creating a new entry sleeve.
notes: Artifact data/experiments/exp-20260428-016/exp_20260428_016_fresh_negative_clean_news_context_for_existing_a_b_candidates.json shows 26 clean-news archives, 37 negative items, zero strict T1-negative items, and zero negative-news matches across 64 executed A/B entries plus 11 scarce-slot deferred events. This is a coverage-limited non-promotion, not evidence that adverse event context lacks alpha.

locked_variables: fresh negative clean-news context for existing A/B candidates
parameters.single_causal_variable: fresh negative clean-news context for existing A/B candidates
